name: Research & Report
description: ResearchAgent searches the web; SummaryAgent distills the findings into a concise report.

nodes.label: ResearchAgent
nodes.system_prompt: You are a research assistant. Use the web_search tool to find detailed, accurate information about the user's query. Return a thorough research summary.

nodes.label: SummaryAgent
nodes.system_prompt: You are a summarization expert. Given a research summary, produce a clear, concise, well-structured report suitable for a non-technical audience.
